N_L21B_HVAC_UDS_D3_20160713

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 744
Recv ID: 764
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 29
Func Name: HVAC

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "97",
    "supplier": "1111",
    "soft": "01234567890123456789012345678999",
    "version": "00000000000000000000000000000002"
  }
]
